title: Panguard.AI: Open-source malware scanner and runtime guard for AI agents | Product Hunt
excerpt: Your AI agent runs third-party skills and MCP servers with full access to your files, keys and shell — no sandbox, no review. I scanned 96,096 published skills; 751 were malicious. PanGuard vets a skill before you install it, scans what you already have, and blocks hijack attempts at runtime. Free, MIT, fully on-device. Powered by 768 open ATR rules, already merged into Microsoft, Cisco, MISP and OWASP tooling. One command: npm install -g panguard && pga up

blocks.html_en: Your AI agent runs third-party skills and MCP servers with full access to your files, keys and shell — no sandbox, no review. I scanned 96,096 published skills; 751 were malicious. sentences.en: Your AI agent runs third-party skills and MCP servers with full access to your files, keys and shell — no sandbox, no review.
sentences.zh: 您的 AI 代理运行第三方技能和 MCP 服务器，可以完全访问您的文件、密钥和 shell — 无需沙箱，无需审查。

sentences.en: I scanned 96,096 published skills; 751 were malicious.
sentences.zh: 我扫描了 96,096 个已发布的技能； 751 是恶意的。

sentences.en: PanGuard vets a skill before you install it, scans what you already have, and blocks hijack attempts at runtime.
sentences.zh: PanGuard 在安装技能之前对其进行审查，扫描您已有的技能，并在运行时阻止劫持尝试。
免费，麻省理工学院，完全在设备上。

sentences.en: Powered by 768 open ATR rules, already merged into Microsoft, Cisco, MISP and OWASP tooling.
sentences.zh: 由 768 个开放 ATR 规则提供支持，已合并到 Microsoft、Cisco、MISP 和 OWASP 工具中。

sentences.en: One command: npm install -g panguard && pga up
sentences.zh: 一条命令： npm install -g panguard && pga up

content_html_zh: 您的 AI 代理运行第三方技能和 MCP 服务器，可以完全访问您的文件、密钥和 shell — 无需沙箱，无需审查。 我扫描了 96,096 个已发布的技能； 751 是恶意的。 PanGuard 在安装技能之前对其进行审查，扫描您已有的技能，并在运行时阻止劫持尝试。 免费，麻省理工学院，完全在设备上。 由 768 个开放 ATR 规则提供支持，已合并到 Microsoft、Cisco、MISP 和 OWASP 工具中。 一条命令： npm install -g panguard && pga up
